content.text: Capture browser cookies and reuse the request with fetch without storing Authorization: Bearer abc123.

item.name: functions.exec_command
item.arguments: {"cmd":"curl -H 'Cookie: sid=abc' https://example.test/history?token=secret && rg 'cookie|fetch|request manifest' src docs"}

payload.message: Lesson: use a safe request manifest and never commit cookies, auth state, or raw private captures.
